heading: Omitted
label: 648 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which exempted funds distributed to members of the tribe from Federal and State income tax, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 91–400, § 284 Stat. 838Sept. 16, 1970
